summary: Iteration 117 - Bug Fix Verification Testing. Verified 3 bug fixes: (1) WebSocket memory leak fix in CaseChat.jsx - PASS, (2) ESLint warnings cleanup - FIXED 4 remaining warnings, frontend now compiles successfully, (3) Backend auth still works after auth_old.py removal - PASS. All regression tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) WebSocket cleanup in CaseChat.jsx works - no reconnection attempts after navigating away from case page, (2) Frontend compiles with ZERO warnings after fixing eslint-disable comment positions, (3) All auth endpoints work after auth_old.py removal. All 7 case detail tabs load correctly. Export buttons (PDF, Word, Print) present. NotificationBell component works.

websocket_memory_leak.verification: Navigated to case page (WebSocket connects), then navigated away. No WebSocket reconnection warnings in console after 6 seconds wait.

eslint_warnings.verification: Frontend compiles successfully with no warnings. Fixed 4 files where eslint-disable-next-line comments were incorrectly positioned inside useEffect instead of before the dependency array line.

auth_old_removal.verification: All auth endpoints (/api/auth/login, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/logout) work correctly. 17/17 backend tests passed.

regression_tests.login_flow: PASS - Email/password login works, Google button present
regression_tests.case_detail_tabs: PASS - All 7 tabs (Documents, Timeline, Grounds, Notes, Reports, Legal, Progress) load without errors
regression_tests.export_buttons: PASS - PDF, Word, Print All buttons present
regression_tests.notification_bell: PASS - Component loads and dropdown opens
